lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਿ ਰਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: laal rataa man maaniaa gur pooraa paaeaa |2|
lines.english: Attuned to the Beloved Lord, the mind is appeased, and finds the Perfect Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਜੀਵਾ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੂ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: hau jeevaa gun saar antar too vasai |
lines.english: I live, by cherishing Your Glorious Virtues; You dwell deep within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਮਨ ਸਮਝਾਇ ਆਖਉ ਕੇਤੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh man samajhaae aakhau ketarraa |
lines.english: O my foolish mind, how can I teach and instruct you?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਰੰਗਿ ਰੰਗੇਤੜਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh har gun gaae rang rangetarraa |4|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and so become attuned to His Love. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਵਸਹਿ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਹਜੇ ਰਸਿ ਰਸੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: toon vaseh man maeh sahaje ras rasai |3|
lines.english: You dwell within my mind, and so it naturally celebrates in joyful delight. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਨਾਲਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੰਤਾਪਣਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: je chaleh gun naal naahee dukh santaapanaa |5|
lines.english: For if you depart with virtue, then pain shall never afflict you. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਨਿਤ ਰਿਦੈ ਸਮਾਲਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਆਪਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: nit nit ridai samaal preetam aapanaa |
lines.english: Continually, continuously, remember and cherish your Beloved Lord in your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਣਾ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh bharam bhulaanaa naa tis rang hai |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wanders around, deluded by doubt; he does not enshrine love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਸੀ ਹੋਇ ਵਿਡਾਣਾ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਭੰਗੁ ਹੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: marasee hoe viddaanaa man tan bhang hai |6|
lines.english: He dies as a stranger to his own self, and his mind and body are spoiled. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gurabaanee nirabaan sabad pachhaaniaa |7|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Bani, and the Shabad, the Word of God, the state of Nirvaanaa is attained. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ਲਾਹਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee kaar kamaae laahaa ghar aaniaa |
lines.english: Performing service to the Guru, you shall go home with the profit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: eik naanak kee aradaas je tudh bhaavasee |
lines.english: Nanak makes this one prayer: if it pleases Your Will,

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਦੀਜੈ ਨਾਮ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਸੀ ॥੮॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: mai deejai naam nivaas har gun gaavasee |8|1|3|
lines.english: bless me with a home in Your Name, Lord, that I may sing Your Glorious Praises. ||8||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਪਾਇ ਭਵੈ ਭਵਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau saakat jonee paae bhavai bhavaaeeai |1|
lines.english: so is the godless materialist reincarnated, and forced to wander aimlessly. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਆਰਣਿ ਲੋਹਾ ਪਾਇ ਭੰਨਿ ਘੜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jiau aaran lohaa paae bhan gharraaeeai |
lines.english: As iron is melted in the forge and re-shaped,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: toon guramukh rakhanahaar har naam dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: You save those who are Gurmukh, O Lord, through meditation on Your Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਬੂਝੇ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin boojhe sabh dukh dukh kamaavanaa |
lines.english: Without understanding, everything is suffering, earning only more suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਵਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai aavai jaae bharam bhulaavanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In his ego, he comes and goes, wandering in confusion, deluded by doubt. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: toon kar kar vekheh aap dehi su paaeeai |
lines.english: You created the Creation, and You Yourself gaze upon it; whatever You give, is received.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਲਹਿ ਤੁਝਹਿ ਰਜਾਇ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: meleh tujheh rajaae sabad kamaaeeai |2|
lines.english: You blend with Yourself, by Your Will, those who practice the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਹੋਵਗਿ ਖਾਕੁ ਪਵਣੁ ਉਡਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: dehee hovag khaak pavan uddaaeeai |
lines.english: The body shall turn to dust, and the soul shall fly away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਿ ਦਰਿ ਬੀਨਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: too dekheh thaap uthaap dar beenaaeeai |3|
lines.english: You watch, establish and disestablish; You keep all in Your vision at Your Door. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਕਿਥੈ ਘਰੁ ਅਉਤਾਕੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: eihu kithai ghar aautaak mehal na paaeeai |4|
lines.english: So where are their homes and resting places now? They do not find the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, either. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਹੁ ਦੀਵੀ ਅੰਧ ਘੋਰੁ ਘਬੁ ਮੁਹਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: dihu deevee andh ghor ghab muhaaeeai |
lines.english: In the pitch darkness of broad daylight, their wealth is being plundered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਰਬਿ ਮੁਸੈ ਘਰੁ ਚੋਰੁ ਕਿਸੁ ਰੂਆਈਐ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: garab musai ghar chor kis rooaaeeai |5|
lines.english: Pride is looting their homes like a thief; where can they file their complaint? ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ਆਗਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਦੀਪਾਈਐ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: sabad nivaaree aag jot deepaaeeai |6|
lines.english: The Word of the Shabad puts out the fire of desire; God's Light illuminates and enlightens. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚੋਰੁ ਨ ਲਾਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਜਗਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh chor na laag har naam jagaaeeai |
lines.english: The thief does not break into the home of the Gurmukh; he is awake in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲੁ ਰਤਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਬੁਝਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: laal ratan har naam gur surat bujhaaeeai |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is a jewel, a ruby; the Guru has taught me the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਨਿਹਕਾਮੁ ਜੇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sadaa rahai nihakaam je guramat paaeeai |7|
lines.english: One who follows the Guru's Teachings remains forever free of desire. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਤਿ ਦਿਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: raat dihai har naau man vasaaeeai |
lines.english: Night and day, enshrine the Lord's Name within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ਜੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਈਐ ॥੮॥੨॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak mel milaae je tudh bhaaeeai |8|2|4|
lines.english: Please unite Nanak in Union, O Lord, if it is pleasing to Your Will. ||8||2||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰਿ ਤਿਵੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau raakheh kirapaa dhaar tivai sukh paaeeai |1|
lines.english: As You keep me, in Your Merciful Grace, so do I find peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: manahu na naam visaar ahinis dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: Never forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord, from your mind; night and day, meditate on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Soohee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਹਉ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਨ ਮੋਹੈ ਮੋਹਣੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: rhau saahib kee ttek na mohai mohanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I remain under the Sheltering Support of my Lord and Master; I am not enticed by Maya the enticer. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਕੁਟੀ ਟੋਹਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: mai andhule har naam lakuttee ttohanee |
lines.english: I am blind, and the Lord's Name is my cane.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਹ ਨਾਲਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੇਖਾਲਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhau teh naal gur dekhaaliaa |
lines.english: Wherever I look, there the Guru has shown me that God is always with me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: sevee satigur bhaae naam niranjanaa |
lines.english: So serve the True Guru with love, through the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਭਾਲਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: antar baahar bhaal sabad nihaaliaa |2|
lines.english: Searching inwardly and outwardly as well, I came to see Him, through the Word of the Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮਤ ਹੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਮਰਣਾ ਆਇ ਕੈ ॥
lines.translit: janamat hee dukh laagai maranaa aae kai |
lines.english: At the very moment of birth, he is afflicted with pain, and in the end, he comes only to die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਰਜਾਇ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਭੰਜਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tudh bhaavai tivai rajaae bharam bhau bhanjanaa |3|
lines.english: As it pleases You, so by Your Will, You destroy my doubts and fears. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਨਾਹੀ ਤੂ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਤੁਧ ਹੀ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau naahee too hoveh tudh hee saajiaa |
lines.english: When there is no ego, there You are; You fashioned all of this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਮਰਣੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਕੈ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: janam maran paravaan har gun gaae kai |4|
lines.english: Birth and death are validated and approved, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||
